login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.quote: Your snout-scouting adventures are ready for documentation.

signup.title: Join the Pack
signup.subtitle: Start documenting your pet's journey today.
signup.name: Your Name
signup.hasAccount: Log in to an existing account
signup.checkEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

forgot.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgot.subtitle: No worries, we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.successDesc: We sent a reset link to {email}. Click the link to set a new password.

home.noPetsDesc: Start tracking your pet's milestones and memories.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.noActivePetDesc: Add a pet to start tracking milestones.
milestones.galleryCount: {count, plural, =0 {No photos yet} one {# photo of {name}} other {# photos of {name}}}
milestones.galleryEmptyDesc: Snap your first memory to start filling this gallery.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove {name} and all their milestones and photos. This can't be undone.
settings.milestoneRemindersDesc: Get notified when milestones are coming up
settings.photoRemindersDesc: Never miss a monthly growth photo
settings.premiumDesc: Unlock everything for your fur family
settings.deleteAccountWarning: This will permanently erase your account and everything tied to it. There is no undo.
settings.deleteAccountOwnerWarningBody: Deleting your account will permanently remove the family and kick out the other {count, plural, one {member} other {# members}}.
settings.deleteAccountOwnerHint: Tip: <link>transfer ownership</link> first to keep the family alive.

petForm.petPhotoDesc: Add your favourite photo of your pet. JPG or PNG.
petForm.inLovingMemoryDesc: Turn this on if your pet has crossed the rainbow bridge.
petForm.speciesRequired: Please select what kind of pet
petForm.dateBirthFuture: Date of birth can't be in the future.
petForm.dateBirthTooOld: That's more than 100 years ago — please double-check.
petForm.dateGotchaFuture: Gotcha day can't be in the future.
petForm.dateGotchaBeforeBirth: Gotcha day can't be before your pet was born.
petForm.dateDeceasedRequired: Please set the date your pet passed.
petForm.dateDeceasedFuture: Date passed can't be in the future.
petForm.dateDeceasedBeforeBirth: Date passed can't be before your pet was born.
petForm.dateDeceasedBeforeGotcha: Date passed can't be before gotcha day.

createPet.title: Add Your
createPet.subtitle: Every pet has a story. Let's start capturing yours.

editPet.title: Edit
editPet.subtitle: Update your pet's details.
editPet.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete {name} and all their milestones and photos. This cannot be undone.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Track your pet's age, milestones, and growth — beautifully.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Create gorgeous milestone cards to share with friends and family.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Tell us about your pet and we'll set everything up for you.

milestoneShare.shareMilestoneSubtitle: Anyone with the link can view this milestone.
milestoneShare.linkReadyBody: Anyone with this link can view the milestone.
milestoneShare.revokeConfirmBody: The link will stop working immediately. You can always create a new one later.

share.unavailableBody: The link may have been revoked or the milestone removed.

inviteAccept.invitedDescLoggedOut: Create your SnapSnout account to join this family. You'll get instant access to all their pets, photos, and milestones.
inviteAccept.joinDesc: You're about to be added to this family. You'll see all their pets, photos, and milestones.
inviteAccept.warningBody: Joining will leave "{current}" and permanently delete its {pets, plural, =0 {pets} one {# pet} other {# pets}}. This can't be undone.
inviteAccept.alreadyMemberDesc: Nothing to do — head back to your dashboard.
inviteAccept.blockedOwnerDesc: You own a family that has other members. Transfer ownership before joining a new family.
inviteAccept.error_expired_body: This invitation has expired. Ask the family owner to send a new one.
inviteAccept.error_revoked_body: The family owner has revoked this invitation.
inviteAccept.error_accepted_body: This invitation has already been accepted.
inviteAccept.error_not_found_body: We couldn't find this invitation. Double-check the link or ask the owner to send a new one.

family.inviteSubtitle: We'll email an invite — or you can grab a link.
family.emailHintSend: We'll send them an invite email.
family.emailHintLink: Leave empty to generate a shareable link instead.
family.generateLinkHint: For people without email — share via WhatsApp, SMS, or in person.
family.expiresInDays: Expires in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
family.resultUserExistsBody: This person already has an account — share the link with them directly.
family.resultFailedBody: We couldn't send the email. You can still share the link manually.
family.resultLinkBody: Anyone with this link can join your family.
family.emailUserExists: This person already has a SnapSnout account — share the link below with them directly.
family.emailFailed: We couldn't send the email. You can still share the link below.
family.removeMemberBody: They'll lose access to the family's pets and photos. Their uploaded photos will stay in the family.
family.leaveBody: You'll lose access to the family's pets and photos. A new solo family will be created for you.
family.transferBody: They'll become the family owner. You'll stay in the family as a regular member and lose owner-only powers (invite, remove, delete pets).

studio.title: AI Magic Studio
studio.subtitle: Create beautiful cards and art with your pet's photos
studio.christmasDesc: Transform your pet into a festive masterpiece for the holidays. Santa hats, snowy landscapes, and cozy vibes included.
studio.retroBlueprintDesc: Technical, architectural drawings of your pet's anatomy and personality traits.
studio.spaceExplorerDesc: Astronaut suits and cosmic backdrops for your adventurous pet.
studio.renaissanceDesc: Classic oil painting portraits in gold frames.
studio.customPromptDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Describe any style — from Pixar animation to Cyberpunk — and our AI will bring it to life.

cardGenerator.title: Card Creator
cardGenerator.subtitle: Turn your pet's photos into shareable masterpieces.
cardGenerator.urbanExplorerDesc: Cooper demonstrated exceptional curiosity today. Our analysis shows a 94% increase in adventurous spirit during the morning walk.

presets.firstCarRideDesc: The great adventure begins with four wheels.
presets.firstVetVisitDesc: A clean bill of health from the very start.
presets.firstToyDestroyedDesc: RIP squeaky duck. You served well.
presets.firstWalkOutsideDesc: Exploring the neighbourhood one sniff at a time.
presets.firstPuppyClassDesc: Learning to be a good boy/girl.
presets.lostFirstBabyToothDesc: Growing up one tooth at a time.
presets.allAdultTeethDesc: No more teething — the furniture is safe (maybe).
presets.firstBirthdayDesc: One whole year of being the best.
presets.switchedToAdultFoodDesc: Big kid meals from now on.
presets.fullyMatureDesc: A true adult in every way.
presets.firstCarRideHomeDesc: The journey to a new life.
presets.firstTailWagDesc: The moment you knew it was real.
presets.threeWeeksDesc: Starting to show their real personality.
presets.threeMonthsDesc: Fully settled in. This is home.
presets.birthdayCelebrationDesc: Celebrating another trip around the sun.
presets.firstPurrDesc: The sweetest sound in the world.
